businesses/demo-clothing-store.name: StyleHub Clothing
businesses/demo-clothing-store.welcomeMessage: Hi! Welcome to StyleHub Clothing 🌟. I am your AI Sales Assistant. Ask me about our latest shirts, frocks, or return policy!
businesses/demo-clothing-store.returnPolicy: Returns or exchanges are allowed within 7 days of purchase. Items must be in original condition with tags.

faqs.question: Do you deliver island-wide?
faqs.answer: Yes, we deliver to any address in Sri Lanka within 2-4 working days.

faqs.question: What are the payment options?
faqs.answer: We accept cash on delivery (COD), card payments via PayHere, and bank transfers.

faqs.question: Where is your shop located?
faqs.answer: We are an online-only store based in Colombo, Sri Lanka.

businesses/demo-clothing-store/products/.name: Slim Fit Cotton Shirt
businesses/demo-clothing-store/products/.description: Premium 100% cotton slim fit formal shirt in Black, White, and Navy Blue. Sizes M, L, XL.

businesses/demo-clothing-store/products/.name: Linen Casual Shirt
businesses/demo-clothing-store/products/.description: Breathable linen casual shirt perfect for warm weather. Available in Pastel Pink, Light Blue, and White.

businesses/demo-clothing-store/products/.name: Floral Summer Dress
businesses/demo-clothing-store/products/.description: Flowy floral printed dress with adjustable waist belt. Sizes S, M, L.

businesses/demo-clothing-store/products/.name: Denim Jacket Classic
businesses/demo-clothing-store/products/.description: Unisex distressed blue denim jacket with copper buttons. Heavyweight premium denim.

businesses/demo-clothing-store/products/.name: Chino Trousers
businesses/demo-clothing-store/products/.description: Stretch chino trousers in Khaki and Charcoal Grey. Slim fit.
